common.siteDescription: We engineer production-grade AI systems, workflow automation, and intelligent platforms for businesses that demand measurable results.

hero.description: We design and deploy AI-powered automation systems, production-grade workflows, and intelligent platforms — from multi-agent orchestration to industrial automation. Engineered in Quebec, deployed worldwide.

servicesSection.label: What We Build
servicesSection.title: From Automation to Intelligence
servicesSection.description: Six core capabilities backed by real deployments, real code, and measurable outcomes.

servicesPage.label: Our Services
servicesPage.title: Engineering That Delivers
servicesPage.description: Every service is grounded in production experience — 195+ workflows deployed, 84K+ lines of AI infrastructure, 10+ years of industrial engineering.

ai-workflow-automation.title: AI Workflow Automation
ai-workflow-automation.shortDescription: Production n8n pipelines integrating LLMs, RAG systems, and business tools — 195+ workflows across 14 domains.
ai-workflow-automation.longDescription: We build end-to-end automation pipelines on n8n that connect AI models (GPT-4, Claude, Whisper, Ollama) to your business stack — CRM, email, documents, voice, IoT. Each workflow includes error handling, audit trails, and human-in-the-loop gates when confidence thresholds are not met.

ai-systems-architecture.title: AI Systems Architecture
ai-systems-architecture.shortDescription: Multi-agent orchestration platforms with mathematically proven convergence and enterprise-grade infrastructure.
ai-systems-architecture.longDescription: Our flagship AINOVA OS is a production AI operating system with 35+ specialized agents, a self-optimizing convergence engine (SOIC), and Tree-of-Thoughts decision exploration. Built on FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kubernetes — designed for teams that need AI they can trust and scale.

fullstack-development.title: Full-Stack Web Development
fullstack-development.shortDescription: Modern web applications and immersive sites — React, Next.js, Three.js — from financial platforms to 3D portfolios.
fullstack-development.longDescription: We deliver production websites and web apps using modern stacks: React 19, Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. From a financial advisor platform with AI chatbot and Canadian-compliant calculators to an immersive 3D portfolio with WebGL — we build what the brief demands.

industrial-automation.title: Industrial Automation & Electrical Engineering
industrial-automation.shortDescription: 10+ years designing and commissioning PLC/CNC systems, industrial production lines, and power grid protection.
industrial-automation.longDescription: Senior electrical engineering expertise across heavy industry: programming and commissioning PLCs and CNCs, designing complex production lines (including defense-sector clients), and engineering HV/MV/LV power grid protection and coordination systems. We bring field-tested rigor to every project.

iot-smart-home.title: IoT & Smart Home Intelligence
iot-smart-home.shortDescription: AI-coordinated home automation, local camera streaming, and edge computing — privacy-first, cloud-independent.
iot-smart-home.longDescription: We build intelligent IoT systems that operate locally: AI-coordinated motion detection, contextual automation based on time and presence, voice-controlled devices, and reverse-engineered camera streaming that bypasses cloud dependencies. All data stays on your network.

custom-ai-tools.title: Custom AI Tools & Integration
custom-ai-tools.shortDescription: Vendor-agnostic LLM toolkits, local-first code assistants, and multi-provider routing — built for zero lock-in.
custom-ai-tools.longDescription: We build custom AI tools that solve specific problems: a multi-LLM abstraction layer supporting 6+ providers with zero vendor lock-in, a local code assistant using open-source models at zero cost, and an intelligent router that balances requests across OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, and Ollama based on cost, latency, and capability.

projectsSection.label: Case Studies
projectsSection.title: Built, Deployed, Measured
projectsSection.description: Real projects with real metrics — not demos, not prototypes.

projectsPage.label: Case Studies
projectsPage.title: Production Systems, Proven Results
projectsPage.description: Every project below runs in production. The code exists, the metrics are real, the systems are live.

ainova-os.title: AINOVA OS
ainova-os.challenge: Existing AI agent frameworks are prototyping tools — they lack convergence guarantees, enterprise security, and production-grade orchestration for complex multi-agent workflows.
ainova-os.solution: Engineered a full AI operating system: 35+ specialized agents, a self-optimizing SOIC convergence engine with mathematical proof, Tree-of-Thoughts decision exploration, BMAD methodology integration, and MCP bridges for Claude Code — deployed on Kubernetes with Prometheus monitoring.
ainova-os.result: 84,000+ lines of production Python. Quality convergence μ = 9.94/10 (Gold Master certified). 1,030+ test functions. Fully containerized with Docker and Kubernetes manifests.

hexstrike-ai.title: HexStrike AI
hexstrike-ai.challenge: Manual penetration testing is time-consuming (6-12h per web app), prone to oversights, and hard to reproduce — no existing platform combines AI orchestration with 150+ security tools in a unified framework.
hexstrike-ai.solution: Engineered an AI-powered cybersecurity MCP framework with 12+ autonomous agents orchestrating 150+ integrated tools: network scanning (nmap, masscan), web testing (nuclei, sqlmap, ffuf), binary analysis (ghidra, radare2), cloud auditing (prowler, trivy), and CTF automation. Browser automation via Selenium/Chromium for advanced web testing.
hexstrike-ai.result: 150+ security tools integrated. 12+ autonomous AI agents. Subdomain enumeration 24x faster. Web app testing 18x faster. 98.7% vulnerability detection rate.

conseiller-placement.title: Financial Advisor Platform
conseiller-placement.challenge: A certified financial advisor at iA Financial Group needed a professional web presence with interactive tools that comply with Canadian financial regulations (RRSP, TFSA, CMHC).
conseiller-placement.solution: Built a dual-stack platform: a production website with Node.js/Express backend (Helmet, rate limiting, input validation) and 4 Canadian-compliant financial calculators with Jest test coverage. Added an AI-powered hybrid chatbot combining rule-based responses with LLM intelligence.
conseiller-placement.result: Fully operational platform with security audit score of 7.8/10. Real client in production. Wealth tracking dashboard built in React 19 + TypeScript.

n8n-ecosystem.title: Enterprise n8n Ecosystem
n8n-ecosystem.challenge: Managing disparate business operations — CRM, finance, documents, communications, IoT — across 14+ functional domains with no unified automation layer.
n8n-ecosystem.solution: Designed and deployed 195 production workflows on n8n: 52 AI-powered (RAG, agents, classifiers), 24 communication automations, 18 document processing pipelines, 17 finance workflows, 16 voice pipelines (Whisper + Piper), and 7 IoT orchestrations. Governance framework scored 9.90/10 on SOIC audit.
n8n-ecosystem.result: 195 workflows in production. 57% AI-powered. 12 custom community nodes installed. Complete governance with 35+ metadata fields per workflow.

stark-portfolio.title: Immersive 3D Portfolio
stark-portfolio.challenge: Standard portfolio sites blend into the noise. The client needed a site that demonstrates technical mastery through the experience itself — not just screenshots.
stark-portfolio.solution: Built a cinematic portfolio with React 19, Three.js (3D Arc Reactor with WebGL shaders), Framer Motion animations, Howler.js procedural audio (6 interactive sounds), and a full 'Overclock Mode' that transforms the entire UI — colors, speed, sounds, messaging — in real time.
stark-portfolio.result: Live on Netlify. 373KB gzipped JS bundle. 10 complete sections. Real-time 3D rendering with mode transformation. 7-second build time on CI/CD.

about.mission: Mark Systems exists to turn complex AI capabilities into production systems that deliver measurable results. We don't sell demos — we ship workflows, agents, and platforms that run 24/7 and prove their value in numbers. Built by an engineer with 10+ years of field experience, every solution is designed for the real world.
about.teamDescription: One engineer. 10+ years in the field. From industrial production lines to AI operating systems.
about.valuesDescription: Four non-negotiable principles that define every engagement.

founder.bio: Senior electrical engineer with 10+ years in industrial automation (PLC/CNC, defense-sector production lines, HV power grid protection). Now building AI automation systems — from a 84K-line AI operating system to 195 production n8n workflows. Based in Quebec, Canada.

0.title: Precision Over Hype
0.description: We ship measurable results, not promises. Every system is benchmarked with real metrics before delivery — no buzzwords, no magic, just engineering.

1.title: Systems Thinking
1.description: Every component is designed for the whole. We build solutions that integrate into existing infrastructure — not isolated prototypes that break on contact with reality.

2.title: Battle-Tested Engineering
2.description: 10+ years of industrial field experience means we build for failure modes, not just happy paths. PLC rigor applied to AI systems.

3.title: Zero Vendor Lock-In
3.description: Multi-LLM, multi-cloud, open-source first. Your systems run on your terms — we build abstraction layers, not dependencies.

ainova.title: AiNova OS — Production AI Operating System | Mark Systems

0.question: What is Mark Systems and how is it related to ECI Mark Systems?
0.answer: Mark Systems is an AI engineering firm specializing in workflow automation, multi-agent orchestration, and intelligent systems, based in Montreal. We have no affiliation with ECI Mark Systems, which is a residential construction ERP software provider.

1.question: What types of AI automation do you offer?
1.answer: We offer AI workflow automation via n8n (195+ deployed workflows), multi-agent system architecture (AINOVA OS), full-stack web development, industrial automation (PLC/CNC), IoT intelligence, and custom AI tools with multi-LLM routing.

2.question: How much does an AI automation project cost?
2.answer: Every project is unique. Cost depends on complexity, number of workflows, required integrations, and level of customization. Contact us for a free assessment of your automation needs.

3.question: Do you work with clients outside Quebec?
3.answer: Yes, we operate remote-first and serve clients worldwide. Our expertise in AI automation, web development, and industrial engineering is available internationally.

4.question: What is AINOVA OS?
4.answer: AINOVA OS is our production AI operating system: 35+ specialized agents, a self-optimizing SOIC convergence engine (μ=9.94/10), Tree-of-Thoughts decision exploration, and Kubernetes infrastructure. It's 84,000+ lines of production Python.

5.question: What is your industrial automation expertise?
5.answer: Our founder has 10+ years of industrial electrical engineering experience: PLC/CNC programming, production line design (including defense sector), and HV/MV/LV power grid protection system engineering.

overview.label: The Problem & Solution
overview.title: Why AiNova OS Exists
problemPoints: AI agent frameworks are prototyping tools, not production systems
No convergence guarantees — outputs vary unpredictably
Security is an afterthought, not a design principle
Scaling from demo to enterprise requires a complete rewrite
solutionPoints: Purpose-built AI operating system with 35+ specialized agents
SOIC convergence engine with mathematical proof (μ=9.94/10)
Enterprise security baked in from day one

features.label: Core Capabilities
features.title: What Powers AiNova OS
features.description: Six foundational capabilities that make AiNova OS a production-grade AI operating system.

soic.title: SOIC Convergence Engine
soic.description: Self-Optimizing Intelligence Convergence — mathematically proven quality convergence across 9 dimensions with μ=9.94/10 Gold Master certification.

tot.title: Tree-of-Thoughts
tot.description: Advanced decision exploration that evaluates multiple reasoning paths simultaneously, selecting optimal solutions through structured deliberation.

agents.title: 35+ Specialized Agents
agents.description: Purpose-built agents for every function — from code generation and testing to security auditing and documentation — orchestrated by a central coordinator.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Role-based access control, audit trails, input validation, and sandboxed execution — security is a design principle, not a patch.

multi-llm.title: Multi-LLM Architecture
multi-llm.description: Vendor-agnostic design supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, and Ollama — intelligent routing based on cost, latency, and capability.

k8s.title: Kubernetes Native
k8s.description: Docker-containerized with Kubernetes manifests, Prometheus monitoring, and Grafana dashboards — built for horizontal scaling from day one.

api.title: API Gateway
